data.title: Billionaire warns Greenland episode shatters Bitcoin myth
data.description:
Canadian billionaire Frank Giustra says the Greenland episode has shattered Bitcoin's "gold" myth.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/billionaire-warns-greenland-episode-shatters-bitcoin-myth

data.title: Sui Network moves on from major outage with mainnet, protocol upgrades
data.description:
After last week’s major six-hour outage, the Sui network has implemented upgrades to its mainnet, deploying version V1. 63. 3, and upgrading the protocol to version 107. The Sui Network rolled out protocol upgrades that reportedly address the underlying issues that may have triggered the outage Cryptopolitan reported last week, which lasted about 6 hours and stalled […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sui-network-mainnet-protocol-upgrades/

data.title: Real Estate Giant Cardone Capital Adds $10M Worth of Bitcoin
data.description:
Cardone Capital, the real estate investment firm led by entrepreneur Grant Cardone, has disclosed another meaningful increase in its Bitcoin exposure, doubling down on its hybrid real estate and cryptocurrency strategy. com.
source: https://www.techgaged.com/real-estate-giant-cardone-capital-adds-10m-worth-of-bitcoin/

data.title: Meta ignoring illegal gambling ads, UK regulator accuses
data.description:
Britain’s gambling watchdog says Meta Platforms Inc. is deliberately overlooking illegal gambling advertisements running on Facebook and Instagram. The Gambling Commission has been checking Meta’s public ad library and finding operators without proper licenses who are targeting UK users. Tim Miller, the regulator’s executive director, talked about the issue during a speech at the ICE […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/meta-illegal-gambling-ads-uk-regulator/

data.title: European Stocks Fall From Near High On Tariffs Over Greenland
data.description:
European stocks fell from a near-record high, while credit risk gauges rose after Trump reignited the trade war between the US and Europe, threatening fresh tariffs over Greenland.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/equities/european-stocks-fall-from-near-high-on-tariffs-over-greenland/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Crashes to Zero on Paradex Exchange as Glitch Fuels Mass Liquidations
data.description:

data.description:

source: https://protos.com/burwick-law-wants-pump-fun-sanctions-over-harassment-claims/

data.title: Ethiopia’s Prime Minister says they are looking for an investment partner to mine Bitcoin
data.description:
Ethiopia’s Prime Minister has announced that the government is actively seeking investment partners for Bitcoin mining. This move is part of the country’s “Digital Ethiopia 2030” plan, which seeks to develop the country’s financial sector and boost capital markets and digitalization. At the Finance Forward Ethiopia 2026 conference, Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed said that Ethiopian […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethiopia-looking-for-partner-to-mine-bitcoin/

data.title: Silver Overtakes Nvidia to Become World’s Second-Largest Asset as Bitcoin Ranks Eighth
data.description:
Silver has surged into the second spot among the world’s largest assets by market capitalization, overtaking NVIDIA and solidifying its role as a primary beneficiary of the current macro uncertainty. At the same time, Bitcoin now ranks eighth globally, sitting behind a mix of precious metals and mega-cap U. S. technology firms
source: https://www.ethnews.com/silver-overtakes-nvidia-to-become-worlds-second-largest-asset-as-bitcoin-ranks-eighth/

data.description:
Instead of outsourcing the sector entirely to foreign firms, the government is now considering a model where crypto mining becomes […] The post Ethiopia Plans Government-Backed Bitcoin Mining appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: Cardano Sentiment Explodes After Hoskinson Interview: Price Moves the Other Way
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) experienced a sharp surge in bullish social sentiment this week, immediately followed by a notable price pullback, according to data from Santiment. The shift came after a high-profile public interview by Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson, which sparked intense debate across crypto social media.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cardano-sentiment-explodes-after-hoskinson-interview-price-moves-the-other-way/

data.title: Gold, Silver Smash Records as Trump Sets Feb. 1 Tariffs Over Greenland Standoff
data.description:
Tariffs have driven gold to $4,689/oz and silver to $94 after Trump has outlined 10% duties from Feb 1 and 25% from June 1 on goods from Denmark, Norway, Sweden, France, Germany, the U. K. , the Netherlands and Finland, tied to Greenland dispute. European stocks have slipped; the BoJ meets Jan. 22-23.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/gold-silver-hit-records-trump-feb-1-tariffs-greenland-standoff/

data.title: Bitcoin Stalls Inside Tightening Range as Volatility Compresses
data.description:
Bitcoin price action is entering a decisive compression phase, with volatility continuing to contract after the sharp January rally. On the 4-hour chart, BTC is currently trading around $93,100, recovering modestly after a swift pullback from recent highs.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-stalls-inside-tightening-range-as-volatility-compresses/

data.title: XRP Mirrors a Pattern That Fueled Its Historic Surge
data.description:
XRP’s long-term chart is flashing a powerful message, and according to veteran technical analysts, the same bullish structures that preceded XRP’s historic rallies are forming once again. com.
source: https://www.techgaged.com/xrp-mirrors-a-pattern-that-fueled-its-historic-surge/
